items.text: Multi-tenant support — isolate and manage multiple environments from a single ProxCenter instance
Tenant management panel in Settings (super admin only)
Per-tenant data isolation — connections, VMs, and configurations scoped to each tenant
Seamless tenant switching from the dashboard
Bulk migration — migrate multiple VMs at once from ESXi or XCP-ng to Proxmox
Live migration support — migrate running VMs with minimal downtime
ESXi migration pipeline with disk download, conversion (qemu-img) and import
XCP-ng migration pipeline with XVA export and automated conversion
Real-time progress tracking per VM during bulk migrations
